# sitecoreauthoring_items (Data Source)

Retrieves the children of a Sitecore item by ID or path.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `existing_version_only` (Boolean) Whether to only retrieve existing versions of items.
- `field_names` (List of String) The names of the fields to retrieve for each child item.
- `item_id` (String) The ID of the parent item to retrieve children for.
- `path` (String) The path of the parent item to retrieve children for.
- `required` (Boolean) Whether the parent item must exist (default: true).

### Read-Only

- `items` (Attributes List) The child items of the parent item. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--items))

<a id="nestedatt--items"></a>
### Nested Schema for `items`

Read-Only:

- `display_name` (String) The display name of the child item.
- `fields` (Map of String) The fields of the child item.
- `item_id` (String) The ID of the child item.
- `name` (String) The name of the child item.
- `path` (String) The path of the child item.
- `template_id` (String) The template ID of the child item.
- `template_name` (String) The template name of the child item.
